title: HOTUT Building Bricks 320 Pieces 2x4 Multicolor, Classic Building Blocks Compatible with Most Major Brands, Large Creative Building Toy for Kids, Building Toys for Kids, Girls, Boys Aged 6 Plus
features: 【Premium Materials】All classic building blocks are made of high-quality ABS material, so they won't bend and break quickly. They have smooth and rounded edges, no burrs, and are strong enough to protect baby's hands. Children can play safely, providing hours of entertainment and educational value.

【4 Hole Particles Multi-Color】These bricks come in a total of 320 bricks in 8 colors with 40 pcs per color - perfect as a first brick set or as a supplement/addition to an existing set. It comes with a lifter that makes it easy to remove the blocks without damaging your nails.

【Compatible with Major Brands】This building block toy is compatible with most other mainstream brands, and children can easily mix them with other classic building blocks and building bases to give full play to their imagination and create bigger works. Suitable for children aged 6 and above.

【Unlimited Creative Fun】Through these granular building blocks, children can build a variety of shapes and structures, thereby developing hand-eye coordination, while greatly improving children's hands-on ability, divergent thinking ability and logical thinking ability, making them a great choice.

【Best Gift for Kids】 The classic building blocks are an ideal birthday or perfect holiday gift for Christmas, Easter, birthdays for boys and girls, it will surely bring surprise and joy to your children, while also improving the parent-child relationship . It also makes a special gift for aging parents.
